title: Show HN: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization language for AI agents
summary: 微软发布Flint，一种专为AI代理设计的可视化中间语言，通过语义类型规范和布局优化引擎提升图表生成可靠性和质量。
translated_summary: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization intermediate language for AI agents, featuring semantic-type specification and layout optimization for reliable, high-quality chart generation.
